LINE_ICD_DGNS_CD 
LABEL: 
Line Diagnosis Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code indicating the diagnosis supporting this line-item procedure/service on the non-institutional 
claim.

CHAR

7

COMMENT: 
For ICD-9 diagnosis codes, this is a 3–5 digit numeric or alpha/numeric value; it
